title: lycopodium complanatum subsp. flabelliforme
intro: Lycopodium complanatum subsp. flabelliforme, also known as club moss, is a type of small, evergreen plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lycopodium complanatum subsp. flabelliforme include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Lycopodium complanatum subsp. flabelliforme can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
